sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97616" key="sugkatabio/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατα-βῐόω</orth>, <sense id="n97616.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">live with</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">together</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">μετ᾽ εὐνοίας</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.754a</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:1:32" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.32</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἡ κακία τοῖς πολλοῖς ς</foreign>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.500f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
